name: Factless Fact Table and Rolling Metrics
description: Build a factless fact table for login events and compute DAU and feature adoption metrics

checks.name: fact_logins has 16 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_logins;

checks.name: DAU on 2025-01-12 = 4
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS n FROM fact_logins WHERE login_date = '2025-01-12';
checks.description: U1, U2, U3, U4 all logged in on Jan 12

checks.name: Free segment dashboard users = 2
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fl.user_id) AS n FROM fact_logins fl JOIN dim_user_login u ON fl.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.segment = 'Free' AND fl.feature_used = 'dashboard';
checks.description: Free segment users (Alice=U1, Carol=U3) both used the dashboard
